description: This is a perefect tennis-wear if you are not comfortable stressing it out in a singlet. It comes in a classic white colour, which can be teamed with any tennis skirt or a pair of jeans, to add a lifestyle touch to the apparel.Every t-shirt has a different identity. It's a medium of expressing your attitude & personality.It is comfortable, durable, easy to wear and maintain which makes it the best 'type' of casual clothing. It has a mass appeal and can be worn in anyway a person wants to. The best part is it just fits anyone of any size. Available in numerous colours and designs which makes it really tough to choose from. Wear it while travelling, playing, exercising, meeting friends, casual get-together's, absolutely anywhere, it won't make you feel out of the place, it is a form of clothing that needs no occasion to advertise itself. Team it up with almost anything and it looks just perfect. It suits everyone and anyone.Is there any other reason a person would want to have one of their own! Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
